Gormon, born Gormon Tyrell, is a maester serving at the Citadel. He is an uncle of Mace Tyrell, Lord of Highgarden.[1]

Contents

  • 1 Recent Events
    • 1.1 A Storm of Swords
    • 1.2 A Feast for Crows
  • 2 Family
  • 3 References

Recent Events[ ]

A Storm of Swords[ ]

After passing over Maesters Erreck and Turquin, the Conclave chooses Maester Gormon as Grand Maester Pycelle's replacement after Tyrion Lannister strips Pycelle of his office. Upon hearing whom the Citadel intends to send as a replacement, Lord Tywin Lannister restores Pycelle to his office.[2]

A Feast for Crows[ ]

Gormon takes Archmaester Walgrave's place beneath the black iron mask to judge those attempting for the ravencraft link. He once accused Pate of theft.[3]
